text.value: CC: Salut!!!
CC: im so glad this worked!!! I am on the live stream, oui? :3 (cat noises where :3 is)
TC: woah there haha welcome
TC: can you turn your mic down a lil youre burstin my eardrums here lol
CC: Oh sorry!!! new satphone, hope ur ok! :3
TC: yeah were all good here arent we lily

text.speaker: lily
text.value: AA: Yes, CC, despite your insistence on cold war era technology and the inherent issues those present, we are all doing "Okay" here. It's good to have you with us.

text.speaker: eden
text.value: CC: ok, yay!
CC: its so nice to actually hear you two again!
TC: dude yeah, todays shapin up to be a full on reunion
AA: It appears we actually have a question for our far off friend.
AA: "CC how the hell did you end up over there?"
CC: funny story...
CC: i hid in my my sis' luggage!!!
CC: she was sooo mad hehehe
CC: but when we got there the airstrip got bombed! and all the roads got checkpoints
CC: so she let me stay :3
CC: good thing she did!!! this place would fall apart without me :3c

text.speaker: mike
text.value: TC: man you were crazy for that
TC: i mean i get wantin to stay with family but damn
AA: I can not think of a sentiment I relate to less.
AA: And I seriously hope you are overstating your involvement in your sisters business.
CC: pfft dont be silly lily!
CC: im a pro at this stuff :3
CC: in fact just yesterday-
CC: oops sorry guys gotta go! hehe :3
